generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for building lighting systems implemented via TwinLight project, configured within BIM environments for automated control logic generation"
]

instance BuildingControlSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized building control system actuator interfacing with Eclipse Hono for real-time bidirectional communication with physical building infrastructure"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PostOccupancyLightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network embedded in building post-occupancy for energy consumption and visual comfort metrics, interfaced via Eclipse Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingEnergyConsumptionData
]

instance BIMMetadataSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor extracting metadata from BIM models to define device configurations (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BIMMetadataData
]

instance ReinforcementLearningOptimizerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning module in BOREALIS project processing sensor feedback for iterative lighting control policy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OptimizationPolicyData
]

instance OccupancyPatternSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor tracking occupancy patterns within building spaces for adaptive control applications"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyPatternData
]

instance EnergyEfficiencySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring energy efficiency metrics across building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyEfficiencyMetrics
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance LightingEnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancyLightingSensor
]

instance BIMMetadataData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMMetadataSensor
]

instance OptimizationPolicyData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ReinforcementLearningOptimizerSensor
]

instance OccupancyPatternData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancyPatternSensor
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyEfficiencySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static BIM model of building infrastructure including geometry, topology, and component relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance OperationalDataRepository : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic operational data repository storing real-time sensor readings and control commands"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance ReinforcementLearningModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven reinforcement learning framework for BOREALIS project optimizing lighting control policies"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization model created in Unreal Engine 5 for real-time building condition monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with runtime semantics (sensors, control logic) via model-driven transformations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform for real-time data synchronization between physical sensors and DT, enabling bidirectional communication via standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:enables LightingDataProcessingService, BIMMetadataProcessingService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time IoT connectivity platform facilitating bidirectional communication between physical actuators and virtual control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingControlService, ReinforcementLearningService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive game engine providing real-time visualization and interactive monitoring of building conditions"
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework automating transformations between BIM models and operational DT artifacts via model-driven engineering principles"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMEnrichmentService, RuntimeInterfaceGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance LightingDataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service processing real-time lighting sensor data for energy optimization and comfort metrics analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingEnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAnalysis
]

instance BIMMetadataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service extracting and validating metadata from BIM models for device configuration and endpoint address management"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMMetadataValidationInsight
]

instance BuildingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Centralized building control service managing lighting and other building automation systems via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingControlAction, FaultDetectionAction
]

instance ReinforcementLearningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for iterative optimization of lighting control policies"
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyOptimizationAction
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of building conditions using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeConditionMonitoring
]

instance BIMEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service extending BIM models with runtime semantics (sensors, control logic) via model-driven engineering"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeSemanticsApplication
]

instance RuntimeInterfaceGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating generation of runtime interfaces for physical components via standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedInterfaceGeneration
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance LightingEnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insight generated from real-time lighting energy consumption metrics enabling proactive energy optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of visual comfort metrics derived from sensor feedback to inform adaptive lighting strategies"
]

instance BIMMetadataValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of BIM metadata ensuring accurate device configurations and endpoint addresses for DT integration"
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action implementing adaptive lighting control based on occupancy patterns and energy optimization requirements"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action detecting and responding to building system faults via real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PolicyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action implementing reinforcement learning-based policy optimization for lighting control systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeConditionMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive monitoring action providing immersive visualization of building conditions via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RuntimeSemanticsApplication : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action applying runtime semantics to BIM models for DT integration and operational capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AutomatedInterfaceGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime interfaces for physical components ensuring seamless DT integration"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingActuator, BuildingControlSystemActuator,
                 PostOccupancyLightingSensor, BIMMetadataSensor,
                 ReinforcementLearningOptimizerSensor, OccupancyPatternSensor,
                 EnergyEfficiencySensor, BIMBuildingModel, OperationalDataRepository,
                 ReinforcementLearningModel, UnrealEngineVisualizationModel,
                 BIMEnrichedModel, EclipseDitto, EclipseHono, UnrealEngine5,
                 ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control outputs via **standardized extension points** in its modular architecture, enabling bidirectional communication with physical systems. Control signals (e.g., actuator commands, lighting schedules) are transmitted back to the building infrastructure through **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, ensuring seamless integration with BCS. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing adjustments without redeployment, thus maintaining operational continuity."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with real-time synchronization, ensuring live updates between physical and virtual representations with minimal latency. The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric evaluates the fidelity of the DT, emphasizing its alignment with physical conditions. While the exact time rates are not specified, the system supports sub-second synchronization for critical operational data, enabling responsive decision-making and control actions within milliseconds to seconds."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - A **centralized DT core** (hosted on a scalable platform) managing bidirectional communication with physical assets via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**.
  - **Modular services** (e.g., visualization, analytics) deployed as plug-ins, enabling extensibility.
  - **BIM as the semantic backbone**, ensuring unified interpretation of building components across disciplines.
  - **Living Lab case study** as the reference implementation, demonstrating interoperability with existing AECO systems (e.g., BIM, IoT platforms). The architecture supports **service-oriented orchestration**, allowing dynamic composition of DT services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all lifecycle stages** of the building: **design** (BIM-based modeling), **construction** (device integration), and **operation** (real-time monitoring and control). It covers representations from **as-designed** (ideal BIM models) to **as-operated** (live sensor data), ensuring alignment with physical conditions. The framework automates transitions between phases, reducing manual intervention while maintaining interoperability with legacy systems."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is evaluated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart. The framework ensures **semantic coherence** by extracting structured metadata from BIM models, reducing **semantic drift** (e.g., via automated synchronization with sensor data). Validation mechanisms include:
  - **Model validation** (e.g., BIM clash detection).
  - **Runtime drift detection** (e.g., anomaly detection in sensor data).
  The DT’s validity is maintained through **real-time data synchronization** and **modular service updates**, ensuring accuracy across lifecycle stages."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT uses Eclipse Hono and Ditto as middleware for bidirectional communication, enabling MQTT-based protocols for real-time data exchange. The technical connection supports cloud-based or edge computing deployments, ensuring scalability and resilience. The system integrates with BIM models to extract device metadata (e.g., tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) for automated configuration. While specific network architectures are not detailed, the focus is on seamless synchronization between physical and virtual components via standardized interfaces."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed via a **model-driven pipeline**:
  1. **BIM Model Input**: Enriched with runtime semantics (e.g., sensor IDs, control logic) via MDE.
  2. **Middleware Integration**: Connects to **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for real-time data exchange.
  3. **Visualization Layer**: Deployed in **Unreal Engine 5** for interactive monitoring.
  4. **Modular Hosting**: Services are deployed as plug-ins, with the core DT hosted on a scalable infrastructure (e.g., cloud/edge). The framework supports **automated redeployment** of services without disrupting operations."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates with BIM-centric workflows for device modeling and control logic configuration. Eclipse Ditto enables interoperability with IoT platforms for real-time data exchange. While the framework does not explicitly mention proprietary tools like Revit or ArchiCAD, it emphasizes BIM standards as the semantic backbone. Horizontal integration supports external systems via standardized extension points, ensuring compatibility with broader AECO ecosystems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to AECO-specific standards such as Building Information Modeling (BIM) as its semantic foundation. While specific standards like IFC or COBie are not explicitly mentioned, the framework leverages BIM as a unified framework for modeling and deployment. The emphasis is on interoperability and modularity to support scalable DT engineering in the AECO domain."
]
